description: R3a-3 capability-cone + coverage goldens — ground truth for the al-sem → Rust differential harness. Each <fixture>.r3a3.golden.json is the ALLOWLISTED projection of the per-routine capabilityFactsDirect / capabilityFactsInherited / coverage, captured POST-computeSummaries (indexWorkspace → resolveModel → buildCombinedGraph → computeSummaries; the dump NEVER runs the dep hooks). All ids in stable form. See scripts/r3a3-projection.ts.
capturePoint: post-computeSummaries (indexWorkspace → resolveModel → buildCombinedGraph → computeSummaries; the final mutated routine.summary cone+coverage; NO dep hooks)
note: R3a-3 is the cone+coverage ONLY. EXCLUDED (later gates): dbEffects/uncertainties/parameterRoles (R3a-2 core), fieldEffects (lazy/detector), the dep hooks (R3a-4), full cross-app (R3a-5). Source-only: .app-bearing fixtures are EXCLUDED.

exclusions.reason: empty model (0 objects/0 routines) — fail-closed single-app provider; not source-only-analyzable
